languages.text: Выбрав следовать заветам Адептус Механикус, Вольный Торговец дозволил{mf||а} аугментировать лишь избранных офицеров. Элите были доступны самые лучшие импланты, покуда чернь погибала от увечий на нижних палубах. Кровавые бунты простолюдинов происходили чаще, однако же, блюстители, чьих тел коснулось благословение Бога-Машины, подавляли их жестоко и эффективно. Ключевой персонал, оборудованный лучшими краниальными разъемами, мог подключаться к системам судна, повышая его боевую эффективность — сопряженные с кораблем вокс-офицеры мгновенно передавали информацию канонирам и пушкарям, ставшим подобными деталям в орудиях.

Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the weapon systems.

languages.text: アデプトゥス・メカニクスの教義に従う道を選んだローグトレーダーは、選ばれた士官のみに強化器を受けることを許した。精鋭たちには最良のインプラントへの道が開かれた一方、卑しき臣民たちは下層甲板でその傷がもとに命を落としていった。庶民の間では血なまぐさい蜂起がいっそう頻繁に起こったが、機械神の祝福にその身を触れられた執行官たちが、それを残忍かつ効果的に鎮圧した。最良の頭蓋インターフェースを備えた要員たちは艦のシステムに接続することができ、それによって艦の戦闘効率は高まった――艦に連結されたヴォックス士官は、自律兵器システムの構成部品さながらと化した砲手や砲兵へと、情報を即座に伝達したのである。
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the self-guided weapon systems.

traits.locale_text: 強化は艦の精鋭のみが受けたもので、乗組員の能力を信じられないほど高めた。ヴォックスの士官たちは艦と融合し、瞬時に情報を伝達することができた。砲手や砲術士たちは自走砲の部品となり、共にヴォン・ヴァランシウス旗艦を無敵の伝説の空母とした。その名は数世紀にわたって語り継がれることとなる。

アデプトゥス・メカニクスの教義に従う道を選んだローグトレーダーは、選ばれた士官のみに強化器を受けることを許した。精鋭たちには最良のインプラントへの道が開かれた一方、卑しき臣民たちは下層甲板でその傷がもとに命を落としていった。庶民の間では血なまぐさい蜂起がいっそう頻繁に起こったが、機械神の祝福にその身を触れられた執行官たちが、それを残忍かつ効果的に鎮圧した。最良の頭蓋インターフェースを備えた要員たちは艦のシステムに接続することができ、それによって艦の戦闘効率は高まった――艦に連結されたヴォックス士官は、自律兵器システムの構成部品さながらと化した砲手や砲兵へと、情報を即座に伝達したのである。

languages.text: 行商浪人决定遵循机械修会的教义，只允许部分军官接受植入物改造。精英阶层得以使用最优质的植入物，而底层民众只能在下层甲板因伤病死去。平民中的血腥暴动愈发频繁，但那些身体受过万机之神祝福的执法者，会以极高的效率将其残酷镇压。配备了最先进颅脑接口的核心人员，可以直接接入舰船系统，使舰船的作战效率显著提升——接入舰船的音阵官员能瞬间将信息传递给枪手和炮兵们，而这些士兵已近乎成为自导武器系统的一部分。
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the self-guided weapon systems.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人决定遵循机械修会的教义，只允许部分军官接受植入物改造。精英阶层得以使用最优质的植入物，而底层民众只能在下层甲板因伤病死去。平民中的血腥暴动愈发频繁，但那些身体受过万机之神祝福的执法者，会以极高的效率将其残酷镇压。配备了最先进颅脑接口的核心人员，可以直接接入舰船系统，使舰船的作战效率显著提升——接入舰船的音阵官员能瞬间将信息传递给枪手和炮兵们，而这些士兵已近乎成为自导武器系统的一部分。

languages.text: Ayant choisi de suivre les préceptes de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} permit uniquement à une poignée d'officiers de recevoir des augmentations. L'élite eut ainsi accès aux implants les plus perfectionnés, tandis que la plèbe mourait de ses blessures sur les ponts inférieurs. Des révoltes sanglantes éclatèrent de plus en plus fréquemment, mais les prévôts, dont les corps avaient été bénis par le Dieu-Machine, les étouffèrent dans l'œuf aussi brutalement qu'efficacement. Des membres clés de l'équipage, dotés d'interfaces crâniennes optimisées, pouvaient se connecter aux systèmes du vaisseau, décuplant ainsi son efficacité au combat : des officiers-vox reliés au vaisseau relayaient instantanément des informations à des artilleurs devenus semblables à des composants de systèmes d'armement autoguidés.
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the self-guided weapon systems.

traits.locale_text: Ayant choisi de suivre les préceptes de l'Adeptus Mechanicus, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} permit uniquement à une poignée d'officiers de recevoir des augmentations. L'élite eut ainsi accès aux implants les plus perfectionnés, tandis que la plèbe mourait de ses blessures sur les ponts inférieurs. Des révoltes sanglantes éclatèrent de plus en plus fréquemment, mais les prévôts, dont les corps avaient été bénis par le Dieu-Machine, les étouffèrent dans l'œuf aussi brutalement qu'efficacement. Des membres clés de l'équipage, dotés d'interfaces crâniennes optimisées, pouvaient se connecter aux systèmes du vaisseau, décuplant ainsi son efficacité au combat : des officiers-vox reliés au vaisseau relayaient instantanément des informations à des artilleurs devenus semblables à des composants de systèmes d'armement autoguidés.

Les augmentations, bien que réservées à l'élite du vaisseau, permirent à l'équipage d'atteindre un niveau incroyable de performance. Les officiers vox furent fusionnés avec le vaisseau afin de pouvoir transmettre des informations instantanément, tandis que les officiers d'artillerie devinrent des composants vivants de canons autoguidés. Toutes ces modifications transformèrent le vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius en une légendaire et invincible créature du vide qui ferait parler d'elle des siècles durant.

languages.text: Habiendo optado por acatar los preceptos del Adeptus Mechanicus, {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente permitió que un puñado de oficiales selectos fuesen aumentados. Aquella élite tuvo el privilegio de recibir los mejores implantes; entre tanto, en las cubiertas inferiores, sus humildes súbditos perecían a causa de sus heridas. Se producían sublevaciones cruentas entre el vulgo con mayor frecuencia; pero los guardias, cuyos cuerpos habían sido agraciados con las bendiciones del Dios Máquina, las reprimían con brutalidad y eficacia. El personal esencial, equipado con las mejores interfaces craneales, podía conectarse a los sistemas de la nave e incrementar su eficacia en combate; los oficiales de vocos, en sintonía con la nave, comunicaban de forma instantánea la información pertinente a los artilleros, que prácticamente se habían convertido en un componente más de los sistemas de armamento automatizados.
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the self-guided weapon systems.

languages.text: Adeptus Mechanicus'un kurallarına uymayı seçen Hür Tacir, yalnızca seçkin subayların ogment almasına izin verdi. Seçkinlere en iyi implantlara erişim izni verilirken sıradan halk, alt güvertelerde yaralarından can verdi. Avam arasında kanlı isyanlar daha sık yaşanır oldu. Ancak bedenlerine Makine Tanrı'nın lütfu dokunmuş infazcılar, bunları acımasızca ve etkili bir şekilde bastırdı. En iyi kafatası arayüzleriyle donatılmış kilit personel, geminin sistemlerine bağlanarak savaş etkinliğini artırdı. Gemiye bağlı voks subayları, kendi güdümlü silah sistemlerinin birer bileşeni hâline gelmiş olan topçulara bilgileri anında iletmeye başladı.
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments. The elite were granted access to the very best implants, while humble subjects perished from their injuries on the lower decks. Bloody uprisings among the common folk occurred more frequently; however, the enforcers, whose bodies had been touched by the blessing of the Machine God, suppressed them brutally and effectively. Key personnel, equipped with the best cranial interfaces, could connect to the ship's systems, thereby increasing its combat effectiveness — vox officers linked to the ship instantly relayed information to gunners and artillerymen, who had become akin to components in the self-guided weapon systems.

languages.text: Nachdem sich {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} entschlossen hatte, den Geboten des Adeptus Mechanicus zu folgen, erhielten nur einige handverlesene Offiziere Augmentationen. Die Elite erhielt Zugang zu den besten Implantaten, während die Untertanen auf den unteren Decks ihren Verletzungen erlagen. Blutige Aufstände des gemeinen Volks mehrten sich, wurden von den Enforcern, deren Leiber den Segen des Maschinengottes erhalten hatten, allerdings brutal und effizient niedergeschlagen. Mit den besten Kranialimplantaten ausgestattete Mitarbeiter konnten sich mit den Systemen des Schiffs verbinden und dessen Kampfkraft erhöhen ... mit dem Schiff verbundene Vox-Offiziere leiteten Daten sofort an die Schützen und Artilleristen weiter, die mittlerweile Komponenten der selbstgelenkten Waffensysteme glichen.
languages.original_text: Having chosen to follow the precepts of the Adeptus Mechanicus, the Rogue Trader permitted only select officers to receive augments.
